subcodes.first_line: O Khalíl! Convey greetings from this Wronged One to the people of Párán. Say: Today His kinship is unto God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل اهل فاران را از قبل مظلوم تکبیر برسان بگو امروز نسبتش بحق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
